analysis.author: anonlessness
analysis.content: Ticket is a bare stub: no description, no children, no git commits referencing it. Created 2026-04-15T22:17 by human. No related work found in git history or done/ tickets. Cannot close without knowing what Stage 1 refers to for the todo CLI itself.

resolution.note: Erroneous stub — no description, no children, no related work. Closing as broken ticket.
